[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, black-and-white anime-style drawing shows a face partially visible as a hand reaches across it, with cropped white text overlays near the top and bottom edges.

Main Subject:
The primary visual focus is an anime-style face shown from the side with eyes and facial features partially visible, while a hand with detailed fingers is positioned in front of the face, extending horizontally across the image.

Setting:
The scene appears to be a graphic artwork background with no clear real-world setting, and the overall image is tightly framed.

Visual Details:
The image uses monochrome gray shading with strong linework. The face occupies the left and center areas, with the hand sweeping across the middle-right. The hand appears in light gray tones, with visible finger contours and curved knuckles, and the face is shaded with darker gray gradients. The background behind the face is also shaded in gray, keeping attention on the close-up composition. The camera framing is very close and cropped, emphasizing the hand and partial facial profile. White, bold, all-caps text overlays are cut off by the image boundaries at the top and bottom.

Visible Text:
Top edge: “KSHWHWHWHRQL”
Bottom edge: “KINGQLSKWUWK”

Practical Summary:
This image is a monochrome anime-style close-up featuring a partially shown face with a hand reaching across it. Cropped bold white text appears at the top and bottom of the frame.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
